    "originalFile": "/**\n * Continuous stdin mode for the Agent CLI.\n * Keeps the session alive and processes messages as they arrive.\n */\n\nimport { Server } from '../server/server.ts';\nimport { Instance } from '../project/instance.ts';\nimport { Bus } from '../bus/index.ts';\nimport { Session } from '../session/index.ts';\nimport { SessionPrompt } from '../session/prompt.ts';\nimport { createEventHandler } from '../json-standard/index.ts';\nimport { createContinuousStdinReader } from './input-queue.js';\nimport { Log } from '../util/log.ts';\nimport { Flag } from '../flag/flag.ts';\nimport { outputStatus, outputError, outputInput } from './output.ts';\n\n// Shared error tracking\nlet hasError = false;\n\n/**\n * Set error state\n * @param {boolean} value - Error state value\n */\nexport function setHasError(value) {\n  hasError = value;\n}\n\n/**\n * Get error state\n * @returns {boolean}\n */\nexport function getHasError() {\n  return hasError;\n}\n\n// outputStatus is now imported from './output.ts'\n// It outputs to stdout for non-error messages, stderr for errors\n\n// Logger for resume operations\nconst log = Log.create({ service: 'resume' });\n\n/**\n * Resolve the session to use based on --resume, --continue, and --no-fork options.\n * Returns the session ID to use, handling forking as needed.\n * @param {object} argv - Command line arguments\n * @param {boolean} compactJson - Whether to use compact JSON output\n * @returns {Promise<{sessionID: string, wasResumed: boolean, wasForked: boolean} | null>} - Session info or null if new session should be created\n * @export\n */\nexport async function resolveResumeSession(argv, compactJson) {\n  const resumeSessionID = argv.resume;\n  const shouldContinue = argv.continue === true;\n  const noFork = argv['no-fork'] === true;\n\n  // If neither --resume nor --continue is specified, return null to create new session\n  if (!resumeSessionID && !shouldContinue) {\n    return null;\n  }\n\n  let targetSessionID = resumeSessionID;\n\n  // If --continue is specified, find the most recent session\n  if (shouldContinue && !targetSessionID) {\n    let mostRecentSession = null;\n    let mostRecentTime = 0;\n\n    for await (const session of Session.list()) {\n      // Skip child sessions (those with parentID) - find top-level sessions only\n      if (session.parentID) {\n        continue;\n      }\n\n      if (session.time.updated > mostRecentTime) {\n        mostRecentTime = session.time.updated;\n        mostRecentSession = session;\n      }\n    }\n\n    if (!mostRecentSession) {\n      outputError(\n        {\n          errorType: 'SessionNotFound',\n          message:\n            'No existing sessions found to continue. Start a new session first.',\n        },\n        compactJson\n      );\n      process.exit(1);\n    }\n\n    targetSessionID = mostRecentSession.id;\n    log.info(() => ({\n      message: 'Found most recent session to continue',\n      sessionID: targetSessionID,\n      title: mostRecentSession.title,\n    }));\n  }\n\n  // Verify the session exists\n  let existingSession;\n  try {\n    existingSession = await Session.get(targetSessionID);\n  } catch (_error) {\n    // Session.get throws an error when the session doesn't exist\n    outputError(\n      {\n        errorType: 'SessionNotFound',\n        message: `Session not found: ${targetSessionID}`,\n      },\n      compactJson\n    );\n    process.exit(1);\n  }\n\n  if (!existingSession) {\n    outputError(\n      {\n        errorType: 'SessionNotFound',\n        message: `Session not found: ${targetSessionID}`,\n      },\n      compactJson\n    );\n    process.exit(1);\n  }\n\n  log.info(() => ({\n    message: 'Resuming session',\n    sessionID: targetSessionID,\n    title: existingSession.title,\n    noFork,\n  }));\n\n  // If --no-fork is specified, continue in the same session\n  if (noFork) {\n    outputStatus(\n      {\n        type: 'status',\n        mode: 'resume',\n        message: `Continuing session without forking: ${targetSessionID}`,\n        sessionID: targetSessionID,\n        title: existingSession.title,\n        forked: false,\n      },\n      compactJson\n    );\n\n    return {\n      sessionID: targetSessionID,\n      wasResumed: true,\n      wasForked: false,\n    };\n  }\n\n  // Fork the session to a new UUID (default behavior)\n  const forkedSession = await Session.fork({\n    sessionID: targetSessionID,\n  });\n\n  outputStatus(\n    {\n      type: 'status',\n      mode: 'resume',\n      message: `Forked session ${targetSessionID} to new session: ${forkedSession.id}`,\n      originalSessionID: targetSessionID,\n      sessionID: forkedSession.id,\n      title: forkedSession.title,\n      forked: true,\n    },\n    compactJson\n  );\n\n  log.info(() => ({\n    message: 'Forked session',\n    originalSessionID: targetSessionID,\n    newSessionID: forkedSession.id,\n  }));\n\n  return {\n    sessionID: forkedSession.id,\n    wasResumed: true,\n    wasForked: true,\n  };\n}\n\n/**\n * Run server mode with continuous stdin input\n * Keeps the session alive and processes messages as they arrive\n */\nexport async function runContinuousServerMode(\n  argv,\n  providerID,\n  modelID,\n  systemMessage,\n  appendSystemMessage,\n  jsonStandard\n) {\n  const compactJson = argv['compact-json'] === true;\n  const isInteractive = argv.interactive !== false;\n  const autoMerge = argv['auto-merge-queued-messages'] !== false;\n\n  // Start server like OpenCode does\n  const server = Server.listen({ port: 0, hostname: '127.0.0.1' });\n  let unsub = null;\n  let stdinReader = null;\n\n  try {\n    // Check if we should resume an existing session\n    const resumeInfo = await resolveResumeSession(argv, compactJson);\n\n    let sessionID;\n\n    if (resumeInfo) {\n      // Use the resumed/forked session\n      sessionID = resumeInfo.sessionID;\n    } else {\n      // Create a new session\n      const createRes = await fetch(\n        `http://${server.hostname}:${server.port}/session`,\n        {\n          method: 'POST',\n          headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },\n          body: JSON.stringify({}),\n        }\n      );\n      const session = await createRes.json();\n      sessionID = session.id;\n\n      if (!sessionID) {\n        throw new Error('Failed to create session');\n      }\n    }\n\n    // Create event handler for the selected JSON standard\n    const eventHandler = createEventHandler(jsonStandard, sessionID);\n\n    // Track if we're currently processing a message\n    let isProcessing = false;\n    const pendingMessages = [];\n\n    // Process messages from the queue\n    const processMessage = async (message) => {\n      if (isProcessing) {\n        pendingMessages.push(message);\n        return;\n      }\n\n      isProcessing = true;\n\n      // Output input confirmation in JSON format\n      outputInput(\n        {\n          raw: message.raw || message.message,\n          parsed: message,\n          format: message.format || 'text',\n        },\n        compactJson\n      );\n\n      const messageText = message.message || 'hi';\n      const parts = [{ type: 'text', text: messageText }];\n\n      // Create a promise to wait for this message to complete\n      const messagePromise = new Promise((resolve) => {\n        const checkIdle = Bus.subscribeAll((event) => {\n          if (\n            event.type === 'session.idle' &&\n            event.properties.sessionID === sessionID\n          ) {\n            checkIdle();\n            resolve();\n          }\n        });\n      });\n\n      // Send message\n      fetch(\n        `http://${server.hostname}:${server.port}/session/${sessionID}/message`,\n        {\n          method: 'POST',\n          headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },\n          body: JSON.stringify({\n            parts,\n            model: { providerID, modelID },\n            system: systemMessage,\n            appendSystem: appendSystemMessage,\n          }),\n        }\n      ).catch((error) => {\n        hasError = true;\n        eventHandler.output({\n          type: 'error',\n          timestamp: Date.now(),\n          sessionID,\n          error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),\n        });\n      });\n\n      await messagePromise;\n      isProcessing = false;\n\n      // Process next pending message if any\n      if (pendingMessages.length > 0) {\n        const nextMessage = pendingMessages.shift();\n        processMessage(nextMessage);\n      }\n    };\n\n    // Subscribe to all bus events and output in selected format\n    unsub = Bus.subscribeAll((event) => {\n      if (event.type === 'message.part.updated') {\n        const part = event.properties.part;\n        if (part.sessionID !== sessionID) {\n          return;\n        }\n\n        if (part.type === 'step-start') {\n          eventHandler.output({\n            type: 'step_start',\n            timestamp: Date.now(),\n            sessionID,\n            part,\n          });\n        }\n\n        if (part.type === 'step-finish') {\n          eventHandler.output({\n            type: 'step_finish',\n            timestamp: Date.now(),\n            sessionID,\n            part,\n          });\n        }\n\n        if (part.type === 'text' && part.time?.end) {\n          eventHandler.output({\n            type: 'text',\n            timestamp: Date.now(),\n            sessionID,\n            part,\n          });\n        }\n\n        if (part.type === 'tool') {\n          eventHandler.output({\n            type: 'tool_use',\n            timestamp: Date.now(),\n            sessionID,\n            part,\n          });\n        }\n      }\n\n      if (event.type === 'session.error') {\n        const props = event.properties;\n        if (props.sessionID !== sessionID || !props.error) {\n          return;\n        }\n        hasError = true;\n        eventHandler.output({\n          type: 'error',\n          timestamp: Date.now(),\n          sessionID,\n          error: props.error,\n        });\n      }\n    });\n\n    // Create continuous stdin reader\n    stdinReader = createContinuousStdinReader({\n      interactive: isInteractive,\n      autoMerge,\n      onMessage: (message) => {\n        processMessage(message);\n      },\n    });\n\n    // Wait for stdin to end (EOF or close)\n    await new Promise((resolve) => {\n      const checkRunning = setInterval(() => {\n        if (!stdinReader.isRunning()) {\n          clearInterval(checkRunning);\n          // Wait for any pending messages to complete\n          const waitForPending = () => {\n            if (!isProcessing && pendingMessages.length === 0) {\n              resolve();\n            } else {\n              setTimeout(waitForPending, 100);\n            }\n          };\n          waitForPending();\n        }\n      }, 100);\n\n      // Also handle SIGINT\n      process.on('SIGINT', () => {\n        outputStatus(\n          {\n            type: 'status',\n            message: 'Received SIGINT. Shutting down...',\n          },\n          compactJson\n        );\n        clearInterval(checkRunning);\n        resolve();\n      });\n    });\n  } finally {\n    if (stdinReader) {\n      stdinReader.stop();\n    }\n    if (unsub) {\n      unsub();\n    }\n    server.stop();\n    await Instance.dispose();\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * Run direct mode with continuous stdin input\n * Keeps the session alive and processes messages as they arrive\n */\nexport async function runContinuousDirectMode(\n  argv,\n  providerID,\n  modelID,\n  systemMessage,\n  appendSystemMessage,\n  jsonStandard\n) {\n  const compactJson = argv['compact-json'] === true;\n  const isInteractive = argv.interactive !== false;\n  const autoMerge = argv['auto-merge-queued-messages'] !== false;\n\n  let unsub = null;\n  let stdinReader = null;\n\n  try {\n    // Check if we should resume an existing session\n    const resumeInfo = await resolveResumeSession(argv, compactJson);\n\n    let Session.createNext({\n        directory: process.cwd(),\n      });\n      sessionID = session.id;\n    }\n\n    // Create event handler for the selected JSON standard\n    const eventHandler = createEventHandler(jsonStandard, sessionID);\n\n    // Track if we're currently processing a message\n    let isProcessing = false;\n    const pendingMessages = [];\n\n    // Process messages from the input confirmation in JSON format\n      outputInput(\n        {\n          raw: message.raw || message.message,\n          parsed: message,\n          format: message.format || 'text',\n        },\n        compactJson\n      );\n\n      const messageText = message.message || 'hi';\n      const parts = [{ type: 'text', text: messageText }];\n\n      // Create a promise to wait for this message to complete\n      const messagePromise = new Promise((resolve) => {\n        const checkIdle = Bus.subscribeAll((event) => {\n          if (\n            event.type === 'session.idle' &&\n            event.properties.sessionID === sessionID\n          ) {\n            checkIdle();\n            resolve();\n          }\n        });\n      });\n\n      // Send message directly\n      SessionPrompt.prompt({\n        sessionID,\n        parts,\n        model: { providerID, modelID },\n        system: systemMessage,\n        appendSystem: appendSystemMessage,\n      }).catch((error) => {\n        hasError = true;\n        eventHandler.output({\n          type: 'error',\n          timestamp: Date.now(),\n          sessionID,\n          error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),\n        });\n      });\n\n      await messagePromise;\n      isProcessing = false;\n\n      // Process next pending message if any\n      if (pendingMessages.length > 0) {\n        const nextMessage = pendingMessages.shift();\n        processMessage(nextMessage);\n      }\n    };\n\n    // Subscribe to all bus events and output in selected format\n    unsub =     "originalFile": "/**\n * Continuous stdin mode for the Agent CLI.\n * Keeps the session alive and processes messages as they arrive.\n */\n\nimport { Server } from '../server/server.ts';\nimport { Instance } from '../project/instance.ts';\nimport { Bus } from '../bus/index.ts';\nimport { Session } from '../session/index.ts';\nimport { SessionPrompt } from '../session/prompt.ts';\nimport { createEventHandler } from '../json-standard/index.ts';\nimport { createContinuousStdinReader } from './input-queue.js';\nimport { Log } from '../util/log.ts';\nimport { Flag } from '../flag/flag.ts';\nimport { outputStatus, outputError, outputInput } from './output.ts';\n\n// Shared error tracking\nlet hasError = false;\n\n/**\n * Set error state\n * @param {boolean} value - Error state value\n */\nexport function setHasError(value) {\n  hasError = value;\n}\n\n/**\n * Get error state\n * @returns {boolean}\n */\nexport function getHasError() {\n  return hasError;\n}\n\n// outputStatus is now imported from './output.ts'\n// It outputs to stdout for non-error messages, stderr for errors\n\n// Logger for resume operations\nconst log = Log.create({ service: 'resume' });\n\n/**\n * Resolve the session to use based on --resume, --continue, and --no-fork options.\n * Returns the session ID to use, handling forking as needed.\n * @param {object} argv - Command line arguments\n * @param {boolean} compactJson - Whether to use compact JSON output\n * @returns {Promise<{sessionID: string, wasResumed: boolean, wasForked: boolean} | null>} - Session info or null if new session should be created\n * @export\n */\nexport async function resolveResumeSession(argv, compactJson) {\n  const resumeSessionID = argv.resume;\n  const shouldContinue = argv.continue === true;\n  const noFork = argv['no-fork'] === true;\n\n  // If neither --resume nor --continue is specified, return null to create new session\n  if (!resumeSessionID && !shouldContinue) {\n    return null;\n  }\n\n  let targetSessionID = resumeSessionID;\n\n  // If --continue is specified, find the most recent session\n  if (shouldContinue && !targetSessionID) {\n    let mostRecentSession = null;\n    let mostRecentTime = 0;\n\n    for await (const session of Session.list()) {\n      // Skip child sessions (those with parentID) - find top-level sessions only\n      if (session.parentID) {\n        continue;\n      }\n\n      if (session.time.updated > mostRecentTime) {\n        mostRecentTime = session.time.updated;\n        mostRecentSession = session;\n      }\n    }\n\n    if (!mostRecentSession) {\n      outputError(\n        {\n          errorType: 'SessionNotFound',\n          message:\n            'No existing sessions found to continue. Start a new session first.',\n        },\n        compactJson\n      );\n      process.exit(1);\n    }\n\n    targetSessionID = mostRecentSession.id;\n    log.info(() => ({\n      message: 'Found most recent session to continue',\n      sessionID: targetSessionID,\n      title: mostRecentSession.title,\n    }));\n  }\n\n  // Verify the session exists\n  let existingSession;\n  try {\n    existingSession = await Session.get(targetSessionID);\n  } catch (_error) {\n    // Session.get throws an error when the session doesn't exist\n    outputError(\n      {\n        errorType: 'SessionNotFound',\n        message: `Session not found: ${targetSessionID}`,\n      },\n      compactJson\n    );\n    process.exit(1);\n  }\n\n  if (!existingSession) {\n    outputError(\n      {\n        errorType: 'SessionNotFound',\n        message: `Session not found: ${targetSessionID}`,\n      },\n      compactJson\n    );\n    process.exit(1);\n  }\n\n  log.info(() => ({\n    message: 'Resuming session',\n    sessionID: targetSessionID,\n    title: existingSession.title,\n    noFork,\n  }));\n\n  // If --no-fork is specified, continue in the same session\n  if (noFork) {\n    outputStatus(\n      {\n        type: 'status',\n        mode: 'resume',\n        message: `Continuing session without forking: ${targetSessionID}`,\n        sessionID: targetSessionID,\n        title: existingSession.title,\n        forked: false,\n      },\n      compactJson\n    );\n\n    return {\n      sessionID: targetSessionID,\n      wasResumed: true,\n      wasForked: false,\n    };\n  }\n\n  // Fork the session to a new UUID (default behavior)\n  const forkedSession = await Session.fork({\n    sessionID: targetSessionID,\n  });\n\n  outputStatus(\n    {\n      type: 'status',\n      mode: 'resume',\n      message: `Forked session ${targetSessionID} to new session: ${forkedSession.id}`,\n      originalSessionID: targetSessionID,\n      sessionID: forkedSession.id,\n      title: forkedSession.title,\n      forked: true,\n    },\n    compactJson\n  );\n\n  log.info(() => ({\n    message: 'Forked session',\n    originalSessionID: targetSessionID,\n    newSessionID: forkedSession.id,\n  }));\n\n  return {\n    sessionID: forkedSession.id,\n    wasResumed: true,\n    wasForked: true,\n  };\n}\n\n/**\n * Run server mode with continuous stdin input\n * Keeps the session alive and processes messages as they arrive\n */\nexport async function runContinuousServerMode(\n  argv,\n  providerID,\n  modelID,\n  systemMessage,\n  appendSystemMessage,\n  jsonStandard\n) {\n  // Check both CLI flag and environment variable for compact JSON mode\n  const compactJson = argv['compact-json'] === true || Flag.COMPACT_JSON();\n  const isInteractive = argv.interactive !== false;\n  const autoMerge = argv['auto-merge-queued-messages'] !== false;\n\n  // Start server like OpenCode does\n  const server = Server.listen({ port: 0, hostname: '127.0.0.1' });\n  let unsub = null;\n  let stdinReader = null;\n\n  try {\n    // Check if we should resume an existing session\n    const resumeInfo = await resolveResumeSession(argv, compactJson);\n\n    let sessionID;\n\n    if (resumeInfo) {\n      // Use the resumed/forked session\n      sessionID = resumeInfo.sessionID;\n    } else {\n      // Create a new session\n      const createRes = await fetch(\n        `http://${server.hostname}:${server.port}/session`,\n        {\n          method: 'POST',\n          headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },\n          body: JSON.stringify({}),\n        }\n      );\n      const session = await createRes.json();\n      sessionID = session.id;\n\n      if (!sessionID) {\n        throw new Error('Failed to create session');\n      }\n    }\n\n    // Create event handler for the selected JSON standard\n    const eventHandler = createEventHandler(jsonStandard, sessionID);\n\n    // Track if we're currently processing a message\n    let isProcessing = false;\n    const pendingMessages = [];\n\n    // Process messages from the queue\n    const processMessage = async (message) => {\n      if (isProcessing) {\n        pendingMessages.push(message);\n        return;\n      }\n\n      isProcessing = true;\n\n      // Output input confirmation in JSON format\n      outputInput(\n        {\n          raw: message.raw || message.message,\n          parsed: message,\n          format: message.format || 'text',\n        },\n        compactJson\n      );\n\n      const messageText = message.message || 'hi';\n      const parts = [{ type: 'text', text: messageText }];\n\n      // Create a promise to wait for this message to complete\n      const messagePromise = new Promise((resolve) => {\n        const checkIdle = Bus.subscribeAll((event) => {\n          if (\n            event.type === 'session.idle' &&\n            event.properties.sessionID === sessionID\n          ) {\n            checkIdle();\n            resolve();\n          }\n        });\n      });\n\n      // Send message\n      fetch(\n        `http://${server.hostname}:${server.port}/session/${sessionID}/message`,\n        {\n          method: 'POST',\n          headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },\n          body: JSON.stringify({\n            parts,\n            model: { providerID, modelID },\n            system: systemMessage,\n            appendSystem: appendSystemMessage,\n          }),\n        }\n      ).catch((error) => {\n        hasError = true;\n        eventHandler.output({\n          type: 'error',\n          timestamp: Date.now(),\n          sessionID,\n          error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),\n        });\n      });\n\n      await messagePromise;\n      isProcessing = false;\n\n      // Process next pending message if any\n      if (pendingMessages.length > 0) {\n        const nextMessage = pendingMessages.shift();\n        processMessage(nextMessage);\n      }\n    };\n\n    // Subscribe to all bus events and output in selected format\n    unsub = Bus.subscribeAll((event) => {\n      if (event.type === 'message.part.updated') {\n        const part = event.properties.part;\n        if (part.sessionID !== sessionID) {\n          return;\n        }\n\n        if (part.type === 'step-start') {\n          eventHandler.output({\n            type: 'step_start',\n            timestamp: Date.now(),\n            sessionID,\n            part,\n          });\n        }\n\n        if (part.type === 'step-finish') {\n          eventHandler.output({\n            type: 'step_finish',\n            timestamp: Date.now(),\n            sessionID,\n            part,\n          });\n        }\n\n        if (part.type === 'text' && part.time?.end) {\n          eventHandler.output({\n            type: 'text',\n            timestamp: Date.now(),\n            sessionID,\n            part,\n          });\n        }\n\n        if (part.type === 'tool') {\n          eventHandler.output({\n            type: 'tool_use',\n            timestamp: Date.now(),\n            sessionID,\n            part,\n          });\n        }\n      }\n\n      if (event.type === 'session.error') {\n        const props = event.properties;\n        if (props.sessionID !== sessionID || !props.error) {\n          return;\n        }\n        hasError = true;\n        eventHandler.output({\n          type: 'error',\n          timestamp: Date.now(),\n          sessionID,\n          error: props.error,\n        });\n      }\n    });\n\n    // Create continuous stdin reader\n    stdinReader = createContinuousStdinReader({\n      interactive: isInteractive,\n      autoMerge,\n      onMessage: (message) => {\n        processMessage(message);\n      },\n    });\n\n    // Wait for stdin to end (EOF or close)\n    await new Promise((resolve) => {\n      const checkRunning = setInterval(() => {\n        if (!stdinReader.isRunning()) {\n          clearInterval(checkRunning);\n          // Wait for any pending messages to complete\n          const waitForPending = () => {\n            if (!isProcessing && pendingMessages.length === 0) {\n              resolve();\n            } else {\n              setTimeout(waitForPending, 100);\n            }\n          };\n          waitForPending();\n        }\n      }, 100);\n\n      // Also handle SIGINT\n      process.on('SIGINT', () => {\n        outputStatus(\n          {\n            type: 'status',\n            message: 'Received SIGINT. Shutting down...',\n          },\n          compactJson\n        );\n        clearInterval(checkRunning);\n        resolve();\n      });\n    });\n  } finally {\n    if (stdinReader) {\n      stdinReader.stop();\n    }\n    if (unsub) {\n      unsub();\n    }\n    server.stop();\n    await Instance.dispose();\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * Run direct mode with continuous stdin input\n * Keeps the session alive and processes messages as they arrive\n */\nexport async function runContinuousDirectMode(\n  argv,\n  providerID,\n  modelID,\n  systemMessage,\n  appendSystemMessage,\n  jsonStandard\n) {\n  const compactJson = argv['compact-json'] === true;\n  const isInteractive = argv.interactive !== false;\n  const autoMerge = argv['auto-merge-queued-messages'] !== false;\n\n  let unsub = null;\n  let stdinReader = null;\n\n  try {\n    // Check if we should resume an existing session\n    const resumeInfo = await resolveResumeSession(argv, compactJson);\n\n    let sessionID;\n\n    if (resumeInfo) {\n      // Use the resumed/forked session\n      sessionID = resumeInfo.sessionID;\n    } else {\n      // Create a new session directly\n      const session = await Session.createNext({\n        directory: process.cwd(),\n      });\n      sessionID = session.id;\n    }\n\n    // Create event handler for the selected JSON standard\n    const eventHandler = createEventHandler(jsonStandard, sessionID);\n\n    // Track if we're currently processing a message\n    let isProcessing = false;\n    const pendingMessages = [];\n\n    // Process messages from the queue\n    const processMessage = async (message) => {\n      if (isProcessing) {\n        pendingMessages.push(message);\n        return;\n      }\n\n      isProcessing = true;\n\n      // Output input confirmation in JSON format\n      outputInput(\n        {\n          raw: message.raw || message.message,\n          parsed: message,\n          format: message.format || 'text',\n        },\n        compactJson\n      );\n\n      const messageText = message.message || 'hi';\n      const parts = [{ type: 'text', text: messageText }];\n\n      // Create a promise to wait for this message to complete\n      const messagePromise = new Promise((resolve) => {\n        const checkIdle = Bus.subscribeAll((event) => {\n          if (\n            event.type === 'session.idle' &&\n            event.properties.sessionID === sessionID\n          ) {\n            checkIdle();\n            resolve();\n          }\n        });\n      });\n\n      // Send message directly\n      SessionPrompt.prompt({\n        sessionID,\n        parts,\n        model: { providerID, modelID },\n        system: systemMessage,\n        appendSystem: appendSystemMessage,\n      }).catch((error) => {\n        hasError = true;\n        eventHandler.output({\n          type: 'error',\n          timestamp: Date.now(),\n          sessionID,\n          error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),\n        });\n      });\n\n      await messagePromise;\n      isProcessing = false;\n\n      // Process next pending message if any\n      if (pendingMessages.length > 0) {\n        const nextMessage = pendingMessages.shift();\n        processMessage(nextMessage);\n      }\n    };\n\n    // Subscribe to all bus events and output in selected format\n    unsub = Bus.subscribeAll((event) => {\n      if (event.type === 'message.part.updated') {\n        const part = event.properties.part;\n        if (part.sessionID !== sessionID) {\n          return;\n        }\n\n        if (part.type === 'step-start') {\n          eventHandler.output({\n            type: 'step_start',\n            timestamp: Date.now(),\n            sessionID,\n            part,\n          });\n        }\n\n        if (part.type === 'step-finish') {\n          eventHandler.output({\n            type: 'step_finish',\n            timestamp: Date.now(),\n            sessionID,\n            part,\n          });\n        }\n\n        if (part.type === 'text' && part.time?.end) {\n          eventHandler.output({\n            type: 'text',\n            timestamp: Date.now(),\n            sessionID,\n            part,\n          });\n        }\n\n        if (part.type === 'tool') {\n          eventHandler.output({\n            type: 'tool_use',\n            timestamp: Date.now(),\n            sessionID,\n            part,\n          });\n        }\n      }\n\n      if (event.type === 'session.error') {\n        const props = event.properties;\n        if (props.sessionID !== sessionID || !props.error) {\n          return;\n        }\n        hasError = true;\n        eventHandler.output({\n          type: 'error',\n          timestamp: Date.now(),\n          sessionID,\n          error: props.error,\n        });\n      }\n    });\n\n    // Create continuous stdin reader\n    stdinReader = createContinuousStdinReader({\n      interactive: isInteractive,\n      autoMerge,\n      onMessage: (message) => {\n        processMessage(message);\n      },\n    });\n\n    // Wait for stdin to end (EOF or close)\n    await new Promise((resolve) => {\n      const checkRunning = setInterval(() => {\n        if (!stdinReader.isRunning()) {\n          clearInterval(checkRunning);\n          // Wait for any pending messages to complete\n          const waitForPending = () => {\n            if (!isProcessing && pendingMessages.length === 0) {\n              resolve();\n            } else {\n              setTimeout(waitForPending, 100);\n compact, one line\n    return JSON.stringify(event) + EOL;\n  }\n  // OpenCode format - pretty-printed\n  return JSON.stringify(event, null, 2) + EOL;\n}\n\n/**\n * Convert OpenCode event to Claude event format\n */\nexport function convertOpenCodeToClaude(\n  event: OpenCodeEvent,\n  startTime: number\n): ClaudeEvent | null {\n  const timestamp = new Date(event.timestamp).toISOString();\n  const session_id = event.sessionID;\n\n  switch (event.type) {\n    case 'step_start':\n      return {\n        type: 'init',\n        timestamp,\n        session_id,\n      };\n\n    case 'text':\n      if (event.part && typeof event.part.text === 'string') {\n        return {\n          type: 'message',\n          timestamp,\n          session_id,\n          role: 'assistant',\n          content: [\n            {\n              type: 'text',\n              text: event.part.text,\n            },\n          ],\n        };\n      }\n      return null;\n\n    case 'tool_use':\n      if (event.part && event.part.state) {\n        const state = event.part.state as Record<string, unknown>;\n        const tool = state.tool as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n        return {\n          type: 'tool_use',\n          timestamp,\n          session_id,\n          name: (tool?.name as string) || 'unknown',\n          input: tool?.parameters || {},\n          tool_use_id: event.part.id as string,\n        };\n      }\n      return null;\n\n    case 'step_finish':\n      return {\n        type: 'result',\n        timestamp,\n        session_id,\n        status: 'success',\n        duration_ms: event.timestamp - opencode: OpenCode format (default) - pretty-printed JSON events\n * - claude: Claude CLI stream-json format - NDJSON (newline-delimited JSON)\n */\n\nimport { EOL } from 'os';\n\nexport type JsonStandard = 'opencode' | 'claude';\n\n/**\n * OpenCode JSON event types\n */\nexport interface OpenCodeEvent {\n  type: 'step_start' | 'step_finish' | 'text' | 'tool_use' | 'error';\n  timestamp: number;\n  sessionID: string;\n  part?: Record<string, unknown>;\n  error?: string | Record<string, unknown>;\n}\n\n/**\n * Claude JSON event types (stream-json format)\n */\nexport interface ClaudeEvent {\n  type: 'init' | 'message' | 'tool_use' | 'tool_result' | 'result';\n  timestamp?: string;\n  session_id?: string;\n  role?: 'assistant' | 'user';\n  content?: Array<{\n    type: 'text' | 'tool_use';\n    text?: string;\n    name?: string;\n    input?: unknown;\n  }>;\n  output?: string;\n  name?: string;\n  input?: unknown;\n  tool_use_id?: string;\n  status?: 'success' | 'error';\n  duration_ms?: number;\n  model?: string;\n}\n\n/**\n * Serialize JSON output based on the selected standard\n */\nexport function serializeOutput(\n  event: OpenCodeEvent | ClaudeEvent,\n  standard: JsonStandard\n): string {\n  if (standard === 'claude') {\n    // NDJSON format - compact, one line\n    return JSON.stringify(event) + EOL;\n  }\n  // OpenCode format - pretty-printed\n  return JSON.stringify(event, null, 2) + EOL;\n}\n\n/**\n * Convert OpenCode event to Claude event format\n */\nexport function convertOpenCodeToClaude(\n  event: OpenCodeEvent,\n  startTime: number\n): ClaudeEvent | null {\n  const timestamp = new Date(event.timestamp).toISOString();\n  const session_id = event.sessionID;\n\n  switch (event.type) {\n    case 'step_start':\n      return {\n        type: 'init',\n        timestamp,\n        session_id,\n      };\n\n    case 'text':\n      if (event.part && typeof event.part.text === 'string') {\n        return {\n          type: 'message',\n          timestamp,\n          session_id,\n          role: 'assistant',\n          content: [\n            {\n              type: 'text',\n              text: event.part.text,\n            },\n          ],\n        };\n      }\n      return null;\n\n    case 'tool_use':\n      if (event.part && event.part.state) {\n        const state = event.part.state as Record<string, unknown>;\n        const tool = state.tool as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n        return {\n          type: 'tool_use',\n          timestamp,\n          session_id,\n          name: (tool?.name as string) || 'unknown',\n          input: tool?.parameters || {},\n          tool_use_id: event.part.id as string,\n        };\n      }\n      return null;\n\n    case 'step_finish':\n      return {\n        type: 'result',\n        timestamp,\n        session_id,\n        status: 'success',\n        duration_ms: event.timestamp - startTime,\n      };\n\n    case 'error':\n      return {\n        type: 'result',\n        timestamp,\n        session_id,\n        status: 'error',\n        output:\n          typeof event.error === 'string'\n            ? event.error\n            : JSON.stringify(event.error),\n      };\n\n    default:\n      return null;\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * Create an event output handler based on the selected standard\n */\nexport function createEventHandler(standard: JsonStandard, sessionID: string) {\n  const startTime = Date.now();\n\n  return {\n    /**\n     * Format and output an event\n     */\n    output(event: OpenCodeEvent): void {\n      const outputStream = process.stdout;\n      if (standard === 'claude') {\n        const claudeEvent = convertOpenCodeToClaude(event, startTime);\n        if (claudeEvent) {\n          outputStream.write(serializeOutput(claudeEvent, standard));\n        }\n      } else {\n        outputStream.write(serializeOutput(event, standard));\n      }\n    },\n\n    /**\n     * Get the start time for duration calculations\n     */\n    getStartTime(): number {\n      return startTime;\n    },\n  };\n}\n\n/**\n * Validate JSON standard option\n */\nexport function isValidJsonStandard(value: string): value is JsonStandard {\n  return value === 'opencode' || value === 'claude';\n}\n","numLines":175,"startLine":1,"totalLines":175}}}

    "originalFile": "/**\n * JSON Standard Format Handlers\n *\n * Provides adapters for different JSON output formats:\n * - opencode: OpenCode format (default) - configurable JSON formatting\n * - claude: Claude CLI stream-json format - NDJSON (newline-delimited JSON)\n *\n * Both formats output to stdout by default, stderr for errors.\n * Use AGENT_CLI_COMPACT env var or --compact-json flag for NDJSON output.\n */\n\nimport { EOL } from 'os';\nimport { Flag } from '../flag/flag.ts';\n\nexport type JsonStandard = 'opencode' | 'claude';\n\n/**\n * OpenCode JSON event types\n */\nexport interface OpenCodeEvent {\n  type: 'step_start' | 'step_finish' | 'text' | 'tool_use' | 'error';\n  timestamp: number;\n  sessionID: string;\n  part?: Record<string, unknown>;\n  error?: string | Record<string, unknown>;\n}\n\n/**\n * Claude JSON event types (stream-json format)\n */\nexport interface ClaudeEvent {\n  type: 'init' | 'message' | 'tool_use' | 'tool_result' | 'result';\n  timestamp?: string;\n  session_id?: string;\n  role?: 'assistant' | 'user';\n  content?: Array<{\n    type: 'text' | 'tool_use';\n    text?: string;\n    name?: string;\n    input?: unknown;\n  }>;\n  output?: string;\n  name?: string;\n  input?: unknown;\n  tool_use_id?: string;\n  status?: 'success' | 'error';\n  duration_ms?: number;\n  model?: string;\n}\n\n/**\n * Serialize JSON output based on the selected standard\n */\nexport function serializeOutput(\n  event: OpenCodeEvent | ClaudeEvent,\n  standard: JsonStandard\n): string {\n  if (standard === 'claude') {\n    // NDJSON format - compact, one line\n    return JSON.stringify(event) + EOL;\n  }\n  // OpenCode format - pretty-printed\n  return JSON.stringify(event, null, 2) + EOL;\n}\n\n/**\n * Convert OpenCode event to Claude event format\n */\nexport function convertOpenCodeToClaude(\n  event: OpenCodeEvent,\n  startTime: number\n): ClaudeEvent | null {\n  const timestamp = new Date(event.timestamp).toISOString();\n  const session_id = event.sessionID;\n\n  switch (event.type) {\n    case 'step_start':\n      return {\n        type: 'init',\n        timestamp,\n        session_id,\n      };\n\n    case 'text':\n      if (event.part && typeof event.part.text === 'string') {\n        return {\n          type: 'message',\n          timestamp,\n          session_id,\n          role: 'assistant',\n          content: [\n            {\n              type: 'text',\n              text: event.part.text,\n            },\n          ],\n        };\n      }\n      return null;\n\n    case 'tool_use':\n      if (event.part && event.part.state) {\n        const state = event.part.state as Record<string, unknown>;\n        const tool = state.tool as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n        return {\n          type: 'tool_use',\n          timestamp,\n          session_id,\n          name: (tool?.name as string) || 'unknown',\n          input: tool?.parameters || {},\n          tool_use_id: event.part.id as string,\n        };\n      }\n      return null;\n\n    case 'step_finish':\n      return {\n        type: 'result',\n        timestamp,\n        session_id,\n        status: 'success',\n        duration_ms: event.timestamp - startTime,\n      };\n\n    case 'error':\n      return {\n        type: 'result',\n        timestamp,\n        session_id,\n        status: 'error',\n        output:\n          typeof event.error === 'string'\n            ? event.error\n            : JSON.stringify(event.error),\n      };\n\n    default:\n      return null;\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * Create an event output handler based on the selected standard\n */\nexport function createEventHandler(standard: JsonStandard, sessionID: string) {\n  const startTime = Date.now();\n\n  return {\n    /**\n     * Format and output an event\n     */\n    output(event: OpenCodeEvent): void {\n      const outputStream = process.stdout;\n      if (standard === 'claude') {\n        const claudeEvent = convertOpenCodeToClaude(event, startTime);\n        if (claudeEvent) {\n          outputStream.write(serializeOutput(claudeEvent, standard));\n        }\n      } else {\n        outputStream.write(serializeOutput(event, standard));\n      }\n    },\n\n    /**\n     * Get the start time for duration calculations\n     */\n    getStartTime(): number {\n      return startTime;\n    },\n  };\n}\n\n/**\n * Validate JSON standard option\n */\nexport function isValidJsonStandard(value: string): value is JsonStandard {\n  return value === 'opencode' || value === 'claude';\n}\n",
